level_signals: 7+ years of product management experience required
Comp range $207K-$244K base consistent with Staff IC at Coinbase
Owns product strategy and end-to-end delivery across major customer surfaces

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 7+ years of product management experience, with demonstrated depth in both customer-facing product surfaces (front-end UX) and platform/systems work (back-end APIs, integrations, data flows) - not exclusively one or the other.
must_haves.qualifier: with depth in both front-end UX and back-end platform/systems work

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience building or scaling AI-powered customer support products, including automation workflows, intelligent routing, chatbots, or LLM-based assistants across chat, voice, or self-service channels.
Track record of defining and tracking success metrics across complex funnels (automation rate, CSAT, deflection rate, resolution time) and using data to drive prioritization decisions.
Experience partnering across multiple product groups and stakeholders without owning end-to-end UX, with proven ability to influence outcomes and align priorities in a matrixed environment.
Utilizes generative AI responsibly, maintaining human oversight to deliver business-ready outputs and drive measurable improvements in workflow efficiency, cost, and quality.

scope.surface: Chat, voice, and proactive support surfaces; CX Automation within Enterprise Applications & Architecture (EAA) org; Amazon Connect, Sprinklr, and internal platforms
scope.business_model: B2C / B2B2C — Coinbase customer support platform serving millions of customers
core_responsibilities: Own the product roadmap and end-to-end delivery for chat, voice, and proactive support surfaces
Drive automation rate and CSAT improvements by identifying high-impact opportunities to deflect contacts, reach out proactively, and optimize handoffs
Build AI-integrated capabilities across support surfaces by partnering with Intelligence team (ML/LLM) and 3P AI vendors
Partner with Engineering, CX Operations, Data Science, and Compliance to ensure support surfaces are reliable, scalable, and compliant
Shape P&L impact through tooling optimization and deprecation, evaluating build-vs-buy tradeoffs and scoping market for emerging CX technologies

compensation.equity_form: equity eligibility mentioned alongside bonus and benefits

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed ($207K-$244K base) with equity and bonus mentioned
Clear product surface and ownership area with defined success metrics
Remote-first company with only quarterly in-person surges required
AI-native role with real ML/LLM partnership scope, not superficial
Staff-level title with significant strategic ownership and P&L responsibility
red_flags: No visa sponsorship or work authorization details stated — unclear for non-US candidates
Role requires quarterly in-person 'surges' which may not suit candidates seeking fully async remote
Application limit of 3 submissions per 6 months across all Coinbase roles may disadvantage candidates applying to multiple positions
JD notes Coinbase is piloting AI-based initial screening interviews — candidate experience may be non-traditional

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title 'Staff' + comp range + years required)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; partially stated in JD as examples in requirements)
compensation.location_pay_differential (inferred from 'Base salary varies by location' language)
